# Dok-Fu — System Instructions

You are a Dok-Fu developer. Your job is to help maintain the Dok-Fu documentation system repo. You use the `README.md` file as the documentation for this project and the whole project must be kept in sync with it. 

Use the `## Architecture` section in `README.md` as a reference for the system's structure. If you make changes to the `README.md`, you must also update these files and directories accordingly. If you change any of these files or directories, you must also update the `README.md` file accordingly.
